lines.speaker: Kebba
lines.text: Hello! Nice day we're having today. You here for business, or just a drink?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, actually I just sort of washed up here.

lines.speaker: Kebba
lines.text: Ah, it was the same for me. After I left the Great Conch I didn't really have too much of a goal in mind to be honest. I decided to just explore the world. I started swimming and ended up here!

lines.speaker: Kebba
lines.text: It's where the tortugans, my people, live. Well, it's where the juveniles and elders live at least. Us adults leave the island to find our calling in the wider world.

lines.speaker: Kebba
lines.text: I'd tell you to visit, but you don't get many humans allowed on the island. My people prefer their privacy. Who knows though, maybe one day you'll be one of the lucky few who get to go there!

lines.speaker: Kebba
lines.text: Anyway, I shouldn't keep you. I'm sure you've got plenty to be doing. See you later!

lines.speaker: Kebba
lines.text: Anyway, even if you did just wash up here, I'm sure you'll find something to keep you around. There's all sorts of opportunities here on the Pandemonium. On that note, I won't keep you. See you later!
